channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: India's Largest Private Earth Observation Satellite Faces Communication Loss Due to Solar Storm
item.description: Mission Drishti, developed by Bengaluru-based startup GalaxEye, is India's largest privately built Earth observation satellite. Launched on May 3, 2026, aboard a Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg, Calif...

item.title: Daily horoscope for July 7, 2026: Insights for each zodiac sign
item.description: The article provides daily horoscope predictions for each zodiac sign on July 7, 2026. Aries is advised to reconsider reliance on others' help, as their intentions may be unclear. Taurus is encouraged...

item.title: Portugal's World Cup Exit and Ronaldo's Retirement: Emotional Reactions from Fans
item.description: Portugal's journey at the 2026 FIFA World Cup ended in heartbreak after a 1-0 defeat to Spain in the Round of 16, marking the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's international career. The dramatic stoppage-tim...

item.title: Tech's rebranding of surveillance tech risks normalizing harassment and non-consensual filming
item.description: The article explores how tech companies are rebranding surveillance technology as aspirational and fashionable, thereby normalizing invasive practices like harassment and non-consensual filming. It hi...

item.title: England's Resilient Victory Over Mexico in World Cup Match
item.description: England's World Cup clash against Mexico showcased tactical brilliance and resilience despite being a man down. After losing Jarrel Quansah to a red card in the second half, manager Thomas Tuchel swif...

item.title: JICA supports Tanzanian women and youth in developing self-employment skills through training programs
item.description: The article highlights JICA's volunteer program, which is training Tanzanian women and youth in entrepreneurship and vocational skills to foster self-employment. Initiatives include workshops on soap ...

item.title: Philippines Prepares for Super Typhoon Bavi's Approach with Emergency Measures
item.description: The Philippines is intensifying preparations as Super Typhoon Bavi approaches, with government agencies coordinating disaster response efforts. According to the latest updates, the storm system is exp...

item.title: IHC grants final adjournment to Imran's counsel in £190m corruption case, warns of no further delays
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has granted a final adjournment to the counsel of former prime minister Imran Khan in his £190 million corruption case. The court issued a stern warning that no further ...

item.title: Fani-Kayode Begins New Role as Nigeria's Envoy to South Africa, Lesotho, and Eswatini
item.description: Former Minister of Aviation, Chief Femi Fani-Kayode, has officially started his new role as Nigeria’s High Commissioner to South Africa, Lesotho, and Eswatini. This development followed the granting o...

item.title: Weak monsoon threatens paddy crops and rice mills in Karnataka's Tungabhadra region
item.description: The Tungabhadra reservoir, critical for irrigation in Karnataka, is facing severe water shortages due to a prolonged weak monsoon. This has jeopardized the paddy crop, which is vital for the region's ...

item.title: Regional Conflicts and Governance Challenges in Africa
item.description: The article highlights critical developments across Africa. In Burkina Faso, the military is accused of trapping civilians in besieged areas, restricting movement and worsening humanitarian conditions...

item.title: Lawyers seek SC order to halt Sara Duterte impeachment trial over leadership disputes
item.description: Lawyers representing Vice President Sara Duterte have reiterated their request for the Supreme Court to issue a status quo ante order and interim relief to suspend the impeachment trial due to unresol...

item.title: China's submarine missile test and the geopolitical tensions it sparked
item.description: A Chinese naval submarine launched a long-range ballistic missile into international waters in the South Pacific, sparking immediate concern among regional allies. While the Chinese government framed ...

item.title: Diamond Platnumz's Stepfather Announces Breakup with Musician's Mother
item.description: Tanzanian musician Diamond Platnumz's stepfather, Uncle Shamte, has confirmed that he and Mama Dangote have broken up. The couple, who have been together for years, have been making headlines for thei...

item.title: USA lose to Belgium in World Cup last-16 clash
item.description: The United States men's national football team suffered a 4-1 defeat to Belgium in the World Cup last-16 match, marking their fourth consecutive exit at this stage of the tournament. The loss followed...

item.title: Former Toronto councillor Renata Ford passes away after legal battle with brother's estate
item.description: Renata Ford, the wife of former Toronto mayor Rob Ford and sister-in-law to Ontario Premier Doug Ford, has died. The Premier confirmed her death in a statement, expressing condolences for her children...

item.title: Oyo APC Governorship Candidate Praises Ambassador Florence Ajimobi’s Diplomatic Achievement in Austria
item.description: The governorship candidate of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Oyo State, Senator Sharafadeen Alli, has praised former First Lady and diplomat Ambassador Florence Ajimobi for her recent diplomat...

item.title: Canadian Astronauts' Post-Retirement Careers and Jeremy Hansen's Next Chapter
item.description: The article explores the diverse career paths of Canadian astronauts after their space careers, using Jeremy Hansen's impending retirement as a focal point. Hansen, who recently completed a lunar miss...

item.title: Home Affairs expands immigration enforcement with 301 new officers and tech upgrades
item.description: The Department of Home Affairs has announced the recruitment of 301 additional Immigration Officers, increasing the frontline workforce from 868 to 1 169, a 35% growth. This expansion aims to strength...

item.title: Philippines and US Express Concern Over China's Submarine Missile Test
item.description: The Philippines and the United States have expressed concern over China's recent test launch of an intercontinental-range ballistic missile from a nuclear-powered submarine in the Pacific Ocean. The D...
